title: Central University of Kerala Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Site Engineer/ Site Supervisor post
shortInfo: Central University of Kerala (CUK) Site Engineer/ Site Supervisor Notification 2026 has been released on 25 May 2026 on the official website Central University of Kerala. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CUK Site Engineer/ Site Supervisor Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 35 years of age who have a B.Tech/BE Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognised University with knowledge in computer applications are eligible to apply for these Site Engineer/ Site Supervisor vacancies. The application process for CUK Site Engineer/ Site Supervisor Recruitment 2026 has started on 26 M

basic_details.job_title: Central University of Kerala Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Site Engineer/ Site Supervisor post
basic_details.short_information: Central University of Kerala (CUK) Site Engineer/ Site Supervisor Notification 2026 has been released on 25 May 2026 on the official website Central University of Kerala. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CUK Site Engineer/ Site Supervisor Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 35 years of age who have a B.Tech/BE Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognised University with knowledge in computer applications are eligible to apply for these Site Engineer/ Site Supervisor vacancies. The application process for CUK Site Engineer/ Site Supervisor Recruitment 2026 has started on 26 M

qualification.details: B.Tech/BE Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognised University. Should have knowledge in computer applications.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Central University of Kerala Site Engineer/ Site Supervisor Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Central University of Kerala recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Central University of Kerala recruitment is 08-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post being advertised by the Central University of Kerala?
faq.answer: The Central University of Kerala is recruiting for the post of Site Engineer/Site Supervisor (Civil).

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Site Engineer/Site Supervisor (Civil) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Site Engineer/Site Supervisor (Civil) position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Tech/BE Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized University and have knowledge in computer applications.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 35 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Site Engineer/Site Supervisor (Civil) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 34,190 per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Site Engineer/Site Supervisor (Civil) post?
faq.answer: The selection process for this post will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply?
faq.answer: The official notification and application link can be found in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
